label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Wait, February's last day is usually the 28th, unless it's a leap year, which would make it the 29th. But 2001 isn't a leap year. Leap years are divisible by 4, right? 2000 was a leap year, then 2004, so 2001 isn't. So Jane's birthday is February 28, 2001. Today is her 16th birthday.
